recommendations.title: Shut In
recommendations.overview: A young single mother is held captive along with her two children by a violent ex and must plot their escape before it’s too late.

recommendations.title: Two for the Money
recommendations.overview: A former college athlete joins forces with a sports consultant to handicap football games for high-rolling gamblers.

recommendations.title: xXx: Return of Xander Cage
recommendations.overview: Xander Cage is left for dead after an incident, though he secretly returns to action for a new, tough assignment with his handler Augustus Gibbons.

recommendations.title: Mary
recommendations.overview: A miraculous conception. A merciless king. A murderous pursuit. Mary's journey to give birth to Jesus unfolds in this biblical coming-of-age epic.

recommendations.title: The Disappointments Room
recommendations.overview: A mother and her young son release unimaginable horrors from the attic of their rural dream home.

recommendations.title: Redeeming Love

recommendations.title: Taking Lives

recommendations.title: Disturbia

recommendations.title: Eagle Eye
recommendations.overview: Jerry Shaw and Rachel Holloman are two strangers whose lives are suddenly thrown into turmoil by a mysterious woman they have never met. Threatening their lives and family, the unseen caller uses everyday technology to control their actions and push

recommendations.title: Murder by Death
recommendations.overview: Lionel Twain invites the world's five greatest detectives to a 'dinner and murder'. Included are a blind butler, a deaf-mute maid, screams, spinning rooms, secret passages, false identities and more plot turns and twists than are decently allowed.
